team_news.notes: Czechia have no injuries or suspensions and Koubek is expected to avoid sweeping changes from the South Korea defeat, sticking with his 3-4-2-1. South Africa are severely depleted: Themba Zwane is banned for 3 matches (red card vs Mexico) and Sphephelo Sithole serves a 1-match suspension, forcing Thalente Mbatha into midfield.

team_news.notes: Mexico were without suspended CB César Montes (red card vs South Africa) forcing Edson Álvarez into a defensive reshuffling, while Julián Quiñones was a slight doubt after being withdrawn through injury in the opener but was expected to start. South Korea came into the match fully fit and with no suspensions — captain Son Heung-min and Lee Kang-in both came through the Czechia win unscathed, with the only selection debate being whether to start impact sub Oh Hyeon-gyu from kick-off.

team_news.notes: Switzerland have a clean bill of health and are near full-strength, with Yakin only considering minor attacking rotation (Manzambi potentially in for Vargas/Okafor). team_news.notes: Haiti report a fully fit squad with no injury concerns ahead of their first World Cup match in 52 years. Scotland are without key midfielder Billy Gilmour (knee injury, tournament-ending), while Scott McTominay (illness) and Scott McKenna (knock) were late doubts but both are expected to start; Tommy Conway also misses out with an ankle problem.
